candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible non
candidates.why: Separate operating-level D&A summary row above Operating profit, so D&A appears outside the selected COGS row. However, the label does not indicate COGS specifically and likely aggregates D&A across multiple operating buckets, so assigning it to COGS alone risks misallocation/double counting.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure beneath the summary row, so not preferred when the summary row exists. Also not bucket-specific to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Granular amortization component under the broader D&A section; not bucket-specific to COGS and should not be chosen over the summary row.
Granular amortization component under the broader D&A section; not bucket-specific to COGS and should not be chosen over the summary row.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible non

variables.notes: R:c. An explicit operating-level D&A summary exists separately from Cost of goods sold, so some D&A may need separate treatment. But the excerpt does not identify which portion belongs to COGS versus SG&A, and using the total D&A row for COGS would likely overstate COGS_DA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization of tangible and intangible non
candidates.why: Separate operating-level D&A summary row above Operating profit, so D&A appears outside the selected XSGA component rows. However, the label is not SG&A-specific and likely includes D&A related to COGS and possibly other operating buckets, so assigning the full amount to XSGA would risk double counting/misallocation.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure beneath the summary row, so not preferred when the summary row exists. Also not SG&A-specific.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Granular amortization component under the broader D&A section; not SG&A-specific and should not be chosen over the summary row.
Granular amortization component under the broader D&A section; not SG&A-specific and should not be chosen over the summary row.

variables.notes: A separate D&A summary row is disclosed at the operating level, but it is not attributable specifically to Salary and personnel expenses, Other Operating Expenses, or Research & Development. Because the earlier mapping already includes a separate R&D row in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding any non-attributed D&A row to XSGA_DA would be unsafe without a bucket split.
